ItacAcademyItem.Name: Accademia del piacere onesto
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Hive with bees flying towards it
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The academy sessions were held in the house of Curzio Guidotti.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
